title: citrus indica
intro: Citrus indica, also known as the lime or sour orange, is a species of citrus plant native to Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Citrus indica have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, as well as providing relief from respiratory issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Citrus indica include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to create topical applications and medicinal remedies.
